title: Verilator Internal Error with 4-state Variable During Simulation Using -fno-expand Option

features.name: 4-state value in array element access with -fno-expand
features.description: Code should include a 4-state variable (logic with x bits) that is used as an array or queue element accessed via index, compiled with -fno-expand option and timing enabled

features.name: queue access with 4-state value under -fno-expand timing
features.description: Code should include a queue (dynamic array) holding 4-state values that are accessed by index, with -fno-expand preventing normal optimization

features.name: Yosys-optimized netlist with x-values and timing
features.description: Code should include a Yosys-optimized netlist containing 4-state variables accessed via array index, processed with Verilator's -fno-expand and --timing options
